'''Mathal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was employed as a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] agent during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He oversaw the pan-[[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] criminal organization's [[Bota/Legends|bota]] smuggling operations on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]].

==Biography==
Though his superiors were unaware of it, Mathal attempted to keep a share of the [[Bota/Legends|bota]] for himself by claiming that [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] required a larger amount of bota than it needed from [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tarnese Bleyd]], the corrupt [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] officer who was working with Black Sun in the bota smuggling ring. In response, Bleyd killed Mathal. In order to hide his crime, the admiral encased the Black Sun operative's body in a [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] block. This was placed upon a small [[Starspin]] vessel which was put on an autopilot course toward the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] blockade where it was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
